'''竏喇-s-dh-z''' ('''kahasdhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnifie|magnifie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnifie|magnifie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-s-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kahasdhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihasdhezoko || jihasdhezoko || shihasdhezoko || kihasdhezoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhasdhezoko || jujuhasdhezoko || shushuhasdhezoko || kukuhasdhezoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhasdhezoko || juhasdhezoko || shuhasdhezoko || kuhasdhezoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhasdhezoko || juhasdhezoko || shuhasdhezoko || kuhasdhezoko
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko || hasdhezoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦhasdhezoko || jﾃｦhasdhezoko || shﾃｦhasdhezoko || kﾃｦhasdhezoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahasdhezoko || jajahasdhezoko || shashahasdhezoko || kakahasdhezoko
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahasdhezoko || jahasdhezoko || shahasdhezoko || kahasdhezoko

=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shahasdhezithi || shahasdheziji || shahasdhezishi || shahasdheziki

|}
